# Capture Packet Template (1 Page)

## 1. Opportunity Snapshot
- Name:
- Source URL:
- Issuing org:
- Due date:
- Vehicle (SBIR/CSO/BAA/subcontract/etc):

## 2. Mission Fit
- Government problem being solved:
- Why now:
- Why SCBE:

## 3. Capability Mapping
- SCBE component -> requirement trace:
- Evidence links (code/tests/docs):

## 4. Delivery Shape
- Pilot scope (60-90 days):
- Integration dependencies:
- Security/compliance notes:

## 5. Economics
- Expected contract range:
- Internal cost estimate:
- Margin hypothesis:

## 6. Risk Register
- Technical risk:
- Contract risk:
- Adoption risk:
- Mitigation plan:

## 7. Outreach Message Draft
- Contact lane:
- One-paragraph message:

## 8. Go / No-Go Decision
- Decision:
- Owner:
- Next milestone date:
